fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Wyoming Occupational Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a occupational therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Wyoming - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: occupational therapist license reciprocity wyoming, how to transfer occupational therapist license to wyoming, occupational therapist compact wyoming, wyoming occupational therapist endorsement application

board.name: Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy
board.mailing_address:
Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy
122 West 25th Street, Suite 100
Cheyenne, WY 82002

license_types.title: Occupational Therapist Registered (OTR)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice occupational therapy independently in Wyoming.

license_types.title: Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant (COTA)
license_types.description: Requires an associate degree and practicing under the supervision of a licensed OTR.

steps.title: Download Application Form
steps.description: Access the Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy's 'Application Information' page and download the 'Application for OT License' PDF form.

steps.title: Complete and Notarize Application
steps.description: Fill out the entire application form accurately and ensure it is notarized by a qualified notary public before submission.

steps.title: Request Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts from all occupational therapy education programs to be sent directly from your educational institution to the Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy.

steps.title: Verify NBCOT Certification
steps.description: Contact the National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy (NBCOT) to request that verification of your certification be sent directly to the Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy.

steps.title: Gather Supporting Documents
steps.description: Include a clear copy of a government-issued photo identification and any other required supporting documentation as specified in the application instructions.

steps.title: Mail Application and Fee
steps.description: Mail the completed and notarized application form, all supporting documents, and the non-refundable $200.00 application fee (check or money order payable to 'Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy') to the Board's mailing address.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NBCOT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NBCOT exam. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Wyoming OT license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around  to . Check the specific fee breakdown.

faqs.question: Is NBCOT certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NBCOT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across all states.

faqs.question: Does Wyoming have reciprocity for occupational therapists?
faqs.answer: Wyoming has enacted the OT Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, occupational therapists still apply by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my occupational therapist license to Wyoming?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Wyoming while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

hero.title: Become a Occupational Therapist in Wyoming
hero.dek: To apply for an Occupational Therapist license in Wyoming, download and complete the required forms from the Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy's Application Information page, as an online portal is currently under development.

official_links.portal_name: Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy Paper Application
official_links.registration_steps: The Wyoming Board of Occupational Therapy currently utilizes a paper application process. Download the "Application for OT License" PDF form from the Board's 'Application Information' page, print it, and complete it by hand or digitally before mailing.
